results.title: Large Language Models explained briefly
results.reason: 3Blue1Brown is world-renowned for visual intuition, and comments consistently highlight this as the gold standard for conceptual clarity for beginners.

results.reason: Strong reach and practical focus on RAG, though it leans slightly more toward implementation than pure theory.

results.title: LLM Explained |  What is LLM
results.reason: Excellent for absolute beginners due to its brevity and simple analogies, as noted in the high viewer appreciation for the 'under 5 minutes' format.

results.title: Stanford CS229 I Machine Learning I Building Large Language Models (LLMs)
results.reason: While highly authoritative, the 104-minute academic lecture format is often too dense for a casual beginner despite the high quality.

results.title: THIS is why large language models can understand the world
results.reason: Excellent for understanding the 'why' behind LLM capabilities, though it requires a slightly higher baseline of interest than a 5-minute intro.
